skills.description: Repository implementation guide for local-skills-mcp. Use when the user asks questions like: explain how src/index.ts and src/skill-loader.ts work together; where MCP tool handlers are defined and how they are registered; walk me through getAllSkillsDirectories priority and override behavior; how local-skills-mcp discovers skills and merges metadata; point me to where validate_skill and evaluate_skill are implemented; or how integration tests are structured in this project.

raw_runs.description: Repository implementation guide for local-skills-mcp. Use when the user asks questions like: explain how src/index.ts and src/skill-loader.ts work together; where MCP tool handlers are defined and how they are registered; walk me through getAllSkillsDirectories priority and override behavior; how local-skills-mcp discovers skills and merges metadata; point me to where validate_skill and evaluate_skill are implemented; or how integration tests are structured in this project.

results.query: Explain how src/index.ts and src/skill-loader.ts work together in local-skills-mcp.
In this local-skills-mcp repo, where are the MCP tool handlers defined and how are they registered?
Walk me through getAllSkillsDirectories priority and override behavior in this codebase.
How does local-skills-mcp discover skills and merge metadata across directories?
Where should I store a personal reusable skill: ~/.claude/skills or ./skills?
Generate a conventional commit message for these staged files.
Write a SQL query for monthly active users grouped by country.
Help me debug a React input lag issue in a controlled component.

skills.description: Operational guide for using Local Skills MCP in day-to-day projects. Use when asked where skills should live (~/.claude/skills, ./.claude/skills, ./skills, SKILLS_DIR), how directory precedence and overrides work, how to configure Claude Code mcp.json, how to create a discoverable skill folder quickly, how to share project skills via git, or how skill edits are picked up with hot reload and no restart.

raw_runs.description: Operational guide for using Local Skills MCP in day-to-day projects. Use when asked where skills should live (~/.claude/skills, ./.claude/skills, ./skills, SKILLS_DIR), how directory precedence and overrides work, how to configure Claude Code mcp.json, how to create a discoverable skill folder quickly, how to share project skills via git, or how skill edits are picked up with hot reload and no restart.

Explain the implementation details of skill metadata truncation in src/index.ts.

skills.description: Use this skill when building, writing, reviewing, or fixing a SKILL.md file for a new or existing skill. Covers choosing skill names, writing and correcting YAML frontmatter (name and description), crafting effective 'Use when' trigger phrases, structuring skill body instructions, and interpreting validate_skill or evaluate_skill results.

raw_runs.description: Use this skill when building, writing, reviewing, or fixing a SKILL.md file for a new or existing skill. Covers choosing skill names, writing and correcting YAML frontmatter (name and description), crafting effective 'Use when' trigger phrases, structuring skill body instructions, and interpreting validate_skill or evaluate_skill results.

results.query: Create a new SKILL.md for a code-review assistant and write a good description with clear Use when triggers.
Can you review my skill frontmatter and fix name/description issues?
I want to improve an existing skill's routing quality. Suggest better trigger keywords.
Help me author a complete SKILL.md template with role, task, constraints, and output format.
Set up nginx with Let's Encrypt for my VPS.
Debug this React useEffect dependency loop.
Write a SQL query to find duplicate rows in orders.
Plan a 5-day Tokyo itinerary with ramen spots.
